chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 467 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.07.2014. Miss Rehana Nazeer Gujjar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G. a/w SIP Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad. = Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that at the instance of private respondents, the official respondents are causing harassment to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. present in Court has filed comments on behalf of respondents No.1 and 2. In the comments, official respondents have denied that they have caused any harassment to the petitioner. They have further asserted in the comments that there is a family dispute going on between the parties. They have also undertaken that they will be providing due protection of law to the petitioner and would ensure that no harassment is caused to her. Such statement satisfies the counsel for the petitioner. In terms of above, the petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner as contemplated under the law. JUDGE
